creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
I have no object if it works fine in your tinderbox. You can add WWW in  
pkg-descr too if you want to. The WWW is  
http://www.mpeg.org/MPEG/video/mssg-free-mpeg-software.html .. Thanks!.

Cheers,
Mezz
